localization.en: Select how you want to connect printers to the HP Workforce Experience Platform.
Connect printers directly to the HP cloud for remote management on the internet
Connect Web Jetadmin printers to the HP cloud using the Print Fleet Proxy app. This allows on-premises printers to be managed remotely in the platform.
Select how to add printers to the platform.
Add up to 10 printers at once by entering serial numbers and product numbers.
Enter the serial and product number for each printer you want to connect. You can add up to 10 printers at once.
Install the HP Print Fleet Proxy and continue on the tray app.
